title: Session 12 — Deeper into the Dark
bodyText:
**TL;DR: Crafting stops and Tad Darkpass's ransacked camp gave way to a near-fatal bog ambush; Trunks walked into the dark alone following the vines, and the horned figure declared Varen out of time.**

# What happened
- Crafting stops ([[pc-trunks|Trunks]]' vial materials; [[pc-felson|Felson]]'s **flight ale** from giant bat wings).
- A grim find: **[[tad-darkpass]]'s abandoned camp** — struggle signs, his +1 warhammer, drag marks leading deeper.
- A bog ambush nearly killed a party member; a heated argument about **Trunks' combat choices** followed.
- On first watch, **Trunks left a vial behind and walked into the dark alone**, [[session-11|following the vines]].
- The horned figure appeared again: [[pc-varen|Varen]] is **out of time**.

# Fired / left smoking
- [[tad-darkpass]] — struggle signs and drag marks leading deeper.
- Trunks walked into the dark alone, leaving a vial behind.
- Varen is **out of time**.

# Threads
[[pc-trunks]] · [[pc-varen]] · [[tad-darkpass]] · [[session-11]]
